channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Wall Street Sees SpaceX’s AI Revenue 100 Times Higher by 2030
item.description: (Bloomberg) -- Research analysts across Wall Street are telling would-be SpaceX IPO buyers that they’re modeling for the company’s artificial intelligence division to see 100 times revenue growth at the end of the decade, to help justify a targeted $1.8 trillion valuation.Most Read from Bloomberg...

item.title: SpaceX and Anthropic: The Most Exciting IPOs Ever?
item.description: SpaceX and Anthropic reflect some of the most exciting debuts we've seen in years. But will they live up to the hype?

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
item.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Tesla (TSLA) stood at $418.45, denoting a -1.24% move from the preceding trading day.

item.title: The Cadillac Lyriq costs $200 more for 2027, but it gains a key new feature
item.description: What’s another $200? Prices for the 2027 Cadillac Lyriq increase by just $200 for the 2027 model year, but it will likely be worth it. more…

item.title: Tesla’s Robo-Taxis Are Finally Driving Themselves—but Not the Stock
item.description: Broadcom’s results were weighing on Tesla shares. If one AI company stubs its toe, other AI companies will say “ow.”

item.title: SpaceX IPO: rockets, AI losses and Musk in control
item.description: SpaceX is inviting investors to bet on Elon Musk's vision of AI data centers in space and humans on Mars.The sky-high valuation for SpaceX -- nearly $1.8 trillion -- is based on the idea that his legendary run will continue and that Musk can achieve his goal of data centers in space and putting p...

item.title: Tesla has its answer to auto growth, it just has to bring it to the U.S.: analyst
item.description: Tesla has its answer to grow its automotive sales over the next few years, TD Cowen analyst Itay Michaeli says, but it just has to bring it to the U.S. On Thursday, Michaeli reiterated his $490 price target and the ‘Buy’ rating he already held on Tesla stock ( NASDAQ: TSLA ). However, its automot...

item.title: As Global Markets Reach Historic Heights, a Distinguished Opportunity Emerges in Elektros INC. Lithium Mining, Rare Earth Minerals, and EV Patent Technology for a New Era of Growth
item.description: Elektros Inc. • Publicly Traded • Ticker Symbol: ELEK Industry Perspective "Lithium batteries are the new oil." - Elon Musk, Tesla CEO (publicly reported statement regarding the strategic importance of battery materials). "Lithium, nickel, ...

item.title: 5 'Boring' Stocks That Crushed the Nasdaq-100 Over Past 5 Years
item.description: Over the past five years, the tech-heavy Nasdaq-100 returned roughly 125%, well ahead of the S&P 500. Even casual investors are likely familiar with the most popular stocks in that index, such as Nvidia, Microsoft and Tesla. But would you believe that there are a number of “boring,” large-cap ...

item.title: SpaceX IPO: The Devil Is in the Details
item.description: This is tool banks such as Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley use to build an order book for the SpaceX IPO.

item.title: Tesla Hardware 3 owners could be made whole this month
item.description: Tesla Hardware 3 owners are set to get a new Full Self-Driving version this month as the company plans to release what it is referring to as v14 Lite. The rollout is not yet confirmed for June, but Tesla executives have stated on several occasions that this more refined FSD iteration will work wi...

item.title: Goldman Sachs Predicts SpaceX Revenue Will Surge 100X By 2030
item.description: The pitch behind the largest U.S. stock market debut in history rests on one number, and it asks investors to suspend a lot of disbelief. Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS), the lead underwriter on the deal, told a potential IPO investor it expects SpaceX’s AI division revenue to climb roughly 100 times by ...

item.title: Waymo’s spent robotaxi batteries will be used as grid storage
item.description: The company announced a deal with B2U Storage Solutions to repurpose the battery packs as Waymo pulls them off the road.

item.title: Tesla extends Austin robotaxi coverage amid FSD push
item.description: The US EV maker announced the expansion through its official robotaxi account on X.

item.title: Buy, Hold, or Sell: Is Tesla Stock a Sell Above $400?
item.description: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) at $423.70 looks expensive, because the price embeds AI and robotics promises the business has not yet delivered. With the stock back above $400 after a 7.95% one-month rebound, the valuation gap between hype and earnings dominates. Tesla remains the world’s most valuable auto...

item.title: Tesla Stock Falls. Blame Broadcom.
item.description: Broadcom’s results were weighing on Tesla shares. If one AI company stubs its toe, other AI companies will say “ow.”

item.title: SpaceX Files $75 Billion IPO at Nearly $1.8 Trillion Valuation
item.description: SpaceX plans a June listing with 555.6 million shares priced at $135 each.

item.title: Tesla Expands Robotaxi Service in Austin
item.description: Unsupervised rides mark another step in Tesla's autonomous driving push.

item.title: BYD Challenges Tesla With Accident-Liability Warranty In China
item.description: BYD's Urban NOA guarantee could raise investor scrutiny on Tesla's self-driving progress and ADAS liability.

item.title: Global EV Momentum Builds: As Electrification Expands Worldwide, Elektros Inc. Advances Its Patent Protection Strategy and Long-Term Shareholder Vision
item.description: Industry Perspective: "Lithium batteries are the new oil." - Elon Musk, Tesla CEO (publicly reported statement regarding the strategic importance of battery materials). "Lithium, nickel, cobalt, manganese and graphite are crucial to battery performance, ...

item.title: TrueCar Adds Two New Industry Leaders to Strengthen Partnerships with Automakers and Build out New Insurance Vertical
item.description: TrueCar, one of the most recognized and trusted automotive brands, today announced two key hires: automotive industry veteran Syl Raymond as Senior Director of OEM, and former Tesla and Marsh executive Nik Huyeng as Vice President of Insurance and Ancillary.

item.title: Why The Tesla-SpaceX Merger Possibility Makes Sense (Rating Upgrade)
SpaceX’s xAI just bought another $269M of Tesla Megapacks
item.description: SpaceX’s amended S-1 IPO filing, published yesterday, reveals that xAI purchased another $269 million worth of Tesla Megapack products in April 2026 alone. That single month exceeds what xAI spent on Tesla Megapacks in all of 2024. The purchase brings total Megapack spending by xAI to roughly $1 ...

item.title: The Hidden Cost of Elon Musk’s AI Ambitions Is Bigger Than Most Public Companies
item.description: Elon Musk’s empire contains a number larger than the entire annual revenue of most public companies on the NYSE. It sits inside SpaceX’s pre-IPO disclosures, and once you see it, Musk’s AI strategy snaps into focus. The Hidden Number Per IPO paperwork, the AI segment inside the combined SpaceX-xA...

item.title: Microcap and Penny Stock Investors: This Is Your Time to Shine - As Global Markets Reach Record Highs and Echo the Excitement of the Dot-Com Era, Elektros Inc. item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, FL / ACCESS Newswire / June 4, 2026 / Industry Perspective "Lithium batteries are the new oil." - Elon Musk, Tesla CEO (publicly reported statement regarding the strategic importance of battery materials). "Lithium, nickel, cobalt, ...

item.title: The $10 Trillion Bet: Why Insiders Think SpaceX Could Rival Apple by Decade’s End
item.description: Bloomberg Businessweek aired a segment on June 2, 2026 in which a guest sketched the outer edge of what SpaceX could be worth by the end of the decade. The figure was $10 trillion. That sits at the top of a bull-case range starting at $3 trillion and stepping through $5 trillion.

item.title: Is OpenAI coming for Tesla's robotics business?
item.description: OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) recently announced it is returning to the robotics business, potentially rivaling Tesla's (TSLA) Optimus robot. Barron's associate editor Al Root discusses the dynamics of the competition in the video above.

item.title: From iPhone to an electric SUV that sprints to 60 mph in 3.8 sec., Foxconn makes it
item.description: The Taiwanese assembly experts at Foxconn have taken the wraps off the Cavira, a new Tesla Model Y competitor that offers a 468 hp AWD powertrain, sub-four-second 0-60 mph performance, and up to 359 miles of range. more…

item.title: SpaceX IPO targets $75 billion at $135 per share
item.description: The rocket and AI company plans to sell 555 million shares at a fixed price, bypassing the traditional price-range method used in most U.S. offerings

item.title: Tesla hit with class action in Quebec over up to $400m in heat pump failures
item.description: A Quebec Tesla owner has filed a class action request against Tesla over heat pump failures, seeking damages for all Tesla owners in the province after being stuck with a $4,477 repair bill when her Model 3’s heat pump died after just six years. The lawsuit covers every Tesla model equipped with ...

item.title: Tesla Stock Falls. Robo-Taxi Progress Isn’t Enough.
item.description: Broadcom’s results were weighing on Tesla shares. If one AI company stubs its toe, other AI companies will say “ow.”

item.title: Waymo’s retired robotaxi batteries are heading back to work
item.description: Waymo’s retired EV batteries won’t be heading straight to recycling anymore. Instead, they’re going to help support the power grid in California and Texas. more…

item.title: SpaceX Targets $75 Billion Capital Raise in Blockbuster IPO
item.description: Space Exploration Technologies, widely known as SpaceX, is seeking to raise about $75 billion in wha

item.title: News Flash: You Are the Exit Liquidity for the SpaceX IPO
item.description: Newly implemented rule changes will allow SpaceX insiders to cash out at the expense of retail investors.

item.title: Want to Buy SpaceX on IPO Day? Here's How.
item.description: The IPO may happen as soon as June 12.

item.title: SpaceXAI just launched into your kitchen with their new app
item.description: SpaceXAI just made its first move into consumer AI, and it involves your grocery cart. On June 3, 2026, Gopuff and SpaceXAI announced the launch of Go, a Grok-powered shopping assistant built directly into the Gopuff app that predicts what you need before you even start searching for it. Gopuff i...

item.title: Tesla Cybercab Is Super Efficient — Questions & Hurdles Remain
item.description: The Tesla Cybercab has achieved a stunning efficiency rating. At 165 Wh/mile efficiency, it has an estimated running cost of 2.6¢/mile. The hyper-efficient Lucid Air Pure, for comparison, has a 230 Wh/mile efficiency.

item.title: ASTS, RKLB, SPCE, RDW Stocks Extend Selloff Overnight — Analyst Backs 'Betting Against Space' Trade As Jefferies Courts SpaceX Bears
item.description: Hedge funds seeking bearish bets on SpaceX have reportedly approached Jefferies, which was absent from the IPO's underwriting lineup.

item.title: Elon Musk, Tesla face serious new threat
item.description: For two years, the question surrounding Tesla's long-term value has been less about electric vehicles and more about one specific project that Elon Musk says could become the company's most valuable business. That project has been moving closer to production with limited serious competition from ...

item.title: Dow Logs Worst Day Since March, S&P 500 And Nasdaq Snap Win Streak After US-Iran Exchange Fire — SNDK, TSLA, GOOGL, META, IREN In Focus
item.description: Iran's paramilitary Revolutionary Guard said it had targeted the headquarters of the US Navy's 5th Fleet in Bahrain, derailing US-Iran ceasefire talks.

item.title: SpaceX or Tesla: What Will Be the Better Buy on June 12?
item.description: SpaceX stock is expected to begin trading by the end of next week.

item.title: Tesla Expands Unsupervised Robotaxi Service To Whole Austin Metro Area
item.description: There’s been some criticism of Tesla’s limited and not entirely perfect robotaxi service in Austin — not to mention the fact that Elon Musk said they’d have robotaxis covering at least 50% of the US population by the end of 2025 … and we’re now almost halfway through 2026. However, ... [continu...

item.title: SpaceX IPO Pricing At $135 Per Share Will Value The Rocket Maker At $1.77 Trillion — Musk To Keep Ironclad Control
item.description: SpaceX is launching the largest U.S. IPO in history by pricing shares at $135, raising $75 billion to fuel rockets, Starlink and AI, while valuing the company at $1.77 trillion and keeping Elon Musk in firm control.

item.title: Tesla Stock Tests Short-Term Moving Averages Amid Surging Scandinavian Demand
item.description: Tesla Inc stock slid on Monday as investors weighed near-term stock pressure against signs that the electric-vehicle maker is recovering sales momentum across several European markets. European Registrations Show Recovery Tesla registrations rose in multiple European countries in May, with...

item.title: SpaceX reveals its share price and record valuation: 555.6 million shares at $135 apiece, at a $1.77 trillion valuation
item.description: The SpaceX filing starts the timer on a hot IPO summer complete with two other highly anticipated IPOs: Anthropic and OpenAI.

item.title: I just got 2026.14.6.7. FSD is still v14.3.3. Maybe just some bug fixes. Anyone else get this
item.description: submitted by /u/SUPER-NIINTENDO [link] [comments]

item.title: What's justifying SpaceX's $2T valuation target ahead of IPO?
item.description: According to Reuters, SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) is gunning for an IPO date of Friday, June 12, with hopes to begin trading on the Nasdaq at $135 per share. This could launch the value of Elon Musk's private space operator to $2 trillion. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Pras Subramanian lays out the most va...

item.title: Used Cybertrucks are in demand, but that won't move Tesla stock
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) first official Cybertruck inventory sold out in 24 hours. Barron's associate editor Al Root explains why and addresses whether the Cybertruck has any bearing on Tesla's stock.

item.title: Tesla piggybacks recent Supercharger feature with update that takes it further
item.description: Tesla has introduced an enhanced visualization in its Supercharger navigation system, building directly on the Site Maps feature rolled out a few months ago. This latest software update adds detailed 3D icons that represent specific vehicle models parked at charging stalls, offering drivers a mor...
